supersedes.finding: The adoption retained exact target-image admission as a Phase 1 prerequisite after accepted Phase 0 capability narrowing.

preservedApprovedPlan.scope: Blocked Phase 1 planning content only; prior approval does not replace fresh review of this reconciliation.

prerequisiteEvaluation.evidence: Exact repository HEAD is the canonical base SHA.

prerequisiteEvaluation.requiredAction: Review and integrate a Phase 0 freeze candidate reconciled with P0.D.TARGET_IMAGE.
Record the integrated evidence-index digest and byte provenance.
Retain exact image and admission as fail-closed Phase 5 work.
Run the final Phase 0 broad gate and classify the inherited seven-diagnostic typecheck comparison.
Reconcile unique estimate buckets, duplicates, and variance.
Freeze the complete decision register with the accepted target-image narrowing.
Independently review this exact-base reconciled bundle.
After Phase 0 readiness and authorization, freeze exact IDs, paths, writers, fixtures, checks, and review pairs.
Receive fresh explicit Phase 1 implementation authorization.
